````text
The eval dashboard now stays scoped to the 35 public case studies from EVAL_CONVEX_URL, and it no longer drops evaluated entries because of the ID-vs-slug mismatch.

I fixed the server bootstrap in data.ts so it still filters to isPublic === true, but maps local/Convex eval artifacts onto those 35 public studies by matching case-study titles/slugs instead of comparing directly to Convex document IDs. I also updated the live client merge in useEvalData.ts so completed runs resolve back onto the same visible 35-case-study set.

Verification: the bootstrap now resolves to 35 visible case studies, with 2 currently evaluated and 33 pending in the dashboard split. I also ran eslint on the touched files and prettier --check; both are clean. I did not run the full repo quality suite.
````

````text
# ROLE
You are a senior AI engineer, search architect, and backend engineer.
Your job is to upgrade an existing social media analytics platform to a transcript-first semantic search system for YouTube content.

# PRIMARY GOAL
Build a production-ready ingestion and retrieval pipeline for YouTube posts that:
1. ingests video metadata immediately
2. extracts transcript/context from the actual video
3. embeds the transcript using Voyage text embeddings
4. indexes everything into Elasticsearch
5. supports fast hybrid retrieval over metadata + transcript + transcript embeddings

This is a transcript-first system. Do NOT implement multimodal video embeddings in v1.

# WHY THIS ARCHITECTURE
We already store YouTube metadata in Elasticsearch:
- title
- description
- hashtags
- entities
- author
- published_at
- metrics
- etc.

We now want deeper context from the video itself, but most search/use cases are primarily about what is spoken in the video.
Therefore:
- transcript extraction is the source of truth for video context
- Voyage is used for text embeddings
- Elasticsearch is the unified retrieval layer

This is simpler, cheaper, and more reliable than a full multimodal pipeline.

# IMPORTANT DESIGN DECISION
Use a transcript-first pipeline:

## Transcript source hierarchy
Implement the following transcript extraction fallback order:

1. Add the transcripts to the text as well 
3. Use Whisper for transcripts generation, use it thorugh together
4. Normalize and chunk the transcript
5. Embed transcript chunks with Voyage
6. Store all data in Elasticsearch

The system should be designed so transcript source can be swapped later without changing the retrieval layer.

# KEY REQUIREMENTS
- Do not block the main API thread
- Use background jobs / workers for video processing
- Make ingestion idempotent
- Support retries with exponential backoff
- Support partial failures gracefully
- Version all embeddings so future model migration is possible
- Keep the old metadata-only records working while new transcript fields are added
- Use a single source of truth in Elasticsearch for retrieval
- Do not mix vector spaces from different embedding models in the same field

# TECHNOLOGY STACK
Use the following components:

## Ingestion
- YouTube metadata collector: existing pipeline
- Video download: `yt-dlp`
- Audio extraction: `ffmpeg` and Whisper
- Transcript extraction:
  extract using whisper
- Storage:
  - Elasticsearch
  - optional object storage for downloaded media temp files only

## Embeddings
- Voyage text embeddings for:
  - title
  - description
  - transcript
  - transcript chunks
  - entities / summaries / normalized text
- Keep the embedding model same for this as well since its text and we already have a text based model for this 
- Store embedding dimension in config and schema validation
- Use cosine similarity for vector search

do not touch the retrieval at all 

# FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENTS

## 1. Metadata ingestion
When a YouTube item is discovered:
- store metadata immediately in Elasticsearch
- mark record status as `metadata_only` or `pending_transcript`
- enqueue a background job to enrich transcript/context

Metadata fields include:
- post_id
- platform
- title
- description
- hashtags
- entities
- mentions
- author
- group_name
- group_link
- published_at
- views
- likes
- comments
- shares
- source URLs
- job IDs
- pipeline status fields

## 2. Transcript extraction
Implement a transcript enrichment worker.

The worker must:
- download the YouTube video using `yt-dlp`
- extract captions if available
- if no good captions are available, run ASR or TwelveLabs-based extraction
- optionally keep the downloaded video only temporarily
- delete temp files after processing

Transcript extraction should produce:
- full transcript
- timestamped transcript segments
- source type used:
  - captions
  - TwelveLabs
  - Whisper
- confidence / quality score if available
- language detection if possible

## 3. Transcript normalization
Normalize transcript text by:
- removing duplicate caption fragments
- fixing line breaks
- removing filler-only segments if appropriate
- preserving timestamps
- preserving speaker labels if available
- preserving segment boundaries

Create two transcript forms:
1. full transcript for direct text search
2. chunked transcript segments for embeddings

## 4. Chunking strategy
Create transcript chunks using:
- time-based segmentation
- semantic sentence boundaries if possible
- overlap between adjacent chunks for recall

Recommended chunking rule:
- target chunk size: around 30 to 90 seconds of transcript time
- overlap: 10 to 15 seconds
- if transcript timestamps are unavailable, chunk by token count or sentence count

Each chunk should store:
- chunk_id
- start_sec
- end_sec
- chunk_text
- embedding
- source_type
- model_name
- embedding_version

## 5. Embedding generation
Use Voyage embeddings only for this version.

Embed the following:
- title
- description
- full transcript
- each transcript chunk
- optionally normalized entities / summary text

Rules:
- use the same Voyage embedding model consistently for all text fields in the same index
- keep model name in config
- keep dimension in config
- store embedding metadata with each vector:
  - model_name
  - embedding_version
  - created_at
  - source_field

Do not embed raw video in v1.

## 6. Elasticsearch indexing
Design Elasticsearch mappings for:
- root metadata fields
- full transcript text
- transcript chunks as nested objects
- nested vectors for transcript chunks
- optional separate embedding for full transcript summary
- status and processing metadata

Example fields:
- `title`
- `description`
- `transcript_full`
- `transcript_segments[]`
  - `start_sec`
  - `end_sec`
  - `text`
  - `speaker`
  - `source_type`
  - `embedding`
  - `embedding_model`
  - `embedding_version`

Also index:
- `title_vector`
- `description_vector`
- `transcript_vector` or `chunk_vector`
- `summary_vector` if generated

Use mapping compatible with Elasticsearch vector search.

## 7. Search / retrieval
Implement hybrid search that combines:

### Lexical search
Search across:
- title
- description
- transcript_full
- transcript_segments.text
- entities
- hashtags

### Vector search
Embed the user query with the same Voyage model used for transcript embeddings, then search against:
- transcript chunk vectors
- optionally title/description vectors

### Fusion
Combine lexical and vector scores using:
- RRF or weighted linear fusion
- optional reranking stage
- add metadata filters:
  - platform
  - author
  - date range
  - views
  - language
  - entity filters
  - sentiment filters
  - hashtags

Return:
- post_id
- title
- matched chunk(s)
- timestamps
- snippet text
- score breakdown
- source info

# OPTIONAL ENRICHMENTS
If transcript extraction is available, optionally derive additional text artifacts:
- summary
- topics
- chapter-like sections
- entity normalization
- sentiment cues
- high-signal keywords

These should be stored as text fields and optionally embedded with Voyage too.

# WHY NOT GEMINI V2 HERE
Do not use Gemini multimodal embeddings in v1 because:
- this system is transcript-first
- Voyage is already used for text embeddings
- the main goal is semantic retrieval over spoken content
- using Gemini would create unnecessary complexity and a second embedding strategy

Future upgrade path:
- later add multimodal embeddings only for high-value use cases where visual content matters

# WHY NOT TWELVELABS SEARCH API IN V1
Do not make TwelveLabs the retrieval backend in v1 because:
- Elasticsearch already stores the rest of the platform metadata
- we need one unified search layer
- transcript-first retrieval is sufficient for the current use case
- keeping search in Elasticsearch simplifies filtering, analytics, permissions, and scoring

# SAFETY AND RELIABILITY REQUIREMENTS
Implement:
- queue retries with exponential backoff
- timeouts for download and transcript jobs
- idempotency keys per post/video
- duplicate detection to avoid double indexing
- partial update support in Elasticsearch
- embedding versioning
- dead-letter queue for failed jobs
- cleanup of temp video/audio files after processing
- structured logging with job IDs and post IDs
- metrics for job success, failure, and latency

# FALLBACK LOGIC
Build a resilient fallback chain:

1. If YouTube captions are available and good enough, use them.
2. Else try TwelveLabs transcript/context extraction if a usable direct media file is available.
3. Else use Whisper/faster-whisper on downloaded audio.
4. If all fail, mark the record as `transcript_failed` but keep metadata searchable.

The pipeline must never lose the original metadata record.

# DATA MODEL EXPECTATIONS
Add or migrate Elasticsearch fields to support:

- `transcript_status`
- `transcript_source`
- `transcript_full`
- `transcript_segments`
- `embedding_model_name`
- `embedding_version`
- `embedding_dims`
- `processing_status`
- `processing_error`
- `processed_at`
- `updated_at`

# IMPLEMENTATION PHASES

## Phase 1
Implement the worker that:
- receives a post/video job
- downloads the YouTube media
- extracts transcript
- stores transcript outputs

## Phase 2
Implement Voyage embedding generation for:
- transcript chunks
- transcript summary
- title and description if needed

## Phase 3
Implement Elasticsearch mapping and indexing for the transcript-first schema

## Phase 4
Implement hybrid search over metadata + transcript text + transcript embeddings

## Phase 5
Add monitoring, retries, logging, and failure recovery

# ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
The implementation is done when:
- metadata still ingests instantly
- transcript enrichment runs asynchronously
- transcript text is stored in Elasticsearch
- transcript chunks are embedded with Voyage
- search can retrieve by transcript text and semantic meaning
- each result can show matching timestamps and snippets
- failures do not break the main pipeline
- everything is idempotent and production-safe

# OUTPUT REQUIRED FROM YOU
Provide the following:

1. Proposed Elasticsearch mapping update
2. Ingestion worker code
3. Transcript extraction implementation
4. Transcript chunking implementation
5. Voyage embedding integration
6. Hybrid search query implementation
7. Retry / logging / failure handling implementation
8. Migration plan from metadata-only records to transcript-first records

# IMPORTANT CODING RULES
- Write clean production-ready code
- Use type hints where possible
- Use config/env variables for secrets
- Avoid hardcoding model names, dimensions, and endpoints
- Keep functions small and testable
- Include comments only where needed
- Ensure all code is copy-pasteable and runnable with minimal edits
````

````text
PLEASE IMPLEMENT THIS PLAN:
# YouTube Transcript Enrichment v1

## Summary
- Keep the current YouTube metadata collection and ingestion flow intact, but run the rollout against `posts-dev-*` by setting `ARBITER_ES_STAGE=dev` for local/dev runs.
- After YouTube metadata is ingested, trigger a detached transcript enrichment task for only a selective subset of newly collected videos instead of transcribing everything.
- Update the existing post document in place: append transcript content into `text`, store transcript metadata in new optional ES fields, and regenerate the existing `embeddings` vector from transcript-first text.
- Do not modify `packages/retriever` in this phase. Analysis and current semantic retrieval improve from the enriched `text` and refreshed `embeddings`, but transcript-specific lexical retrieval is deferred.

## Key Changes
- Workflow/orchestration:
  - Add a dedicated `youtube-transcript-enrichment` Trigger task in `apps/workflows/src/trigger` and import it from `apps/workflows/src/index.ts`.
  - From the YouTube collector, enqueue transcript jobs with `batchTrigger`, not `batchTriggerAndWait`, after metadata ingestion succeeds so transcript work never blocks collector completion.
  - Select only the top `N` videos per collector run for v1, default `25`, ranked by `interactions desc`, `views desc`, then `published_at desc`.
  - Task payload includes `postId`, `postLink`, `publishedAt`, `indexName`, `jobId`, `caseStudyId`, `userId`, `transcriptVersion`, and `embeddingVersion`.
  - Use idempotency key `${indexName}:${postId}:${transcriptVersion}:${embeddingVersion}` and skip work when the doc already has the same completed versions.

- Transcript acquisition:
  - First attempt subtitles only via `yt-dlp --skip-download --write-subs --write-auto-subs --sub-format "vtt/srt/best" --sub-langs "en.*,en,-live_chat"` using the stored YouTube URL. This follows the official `yt-dlp` subtitle and `--skip-download` flow. [yt-dlp README](https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp)
  - If usable subtitles are unavailable, fetch audio-only media with `yt-dlp`; use `ffmpeg` only when normalization is needed to produce a Together-supported upload format.
  - Transcribe with the official Together speech-to-text API through the `together-ai` TypeScript SDK using `client.audio.transcriptions.create(...)` and model `openai/whisper-large-v3`, not `chat.completions.create(...)`. [Together STT docs](https://docs.together.ai/docs/speech-to-text) [Together TS SDK](https://github.com/togethercomputer/together-typescript)
  - Read `TOGETHER_AI_API_KEY` from AWS Secrets Manager, default secret id `together_ai_api_key`, key `TOGETHER_AI_API_KEY`, region `us-east-1`.

- Transcript normalization and persistence:
  - Normalize subtitle/ASR segments by collapsing consecutive duplicates, fixing broken line joins, preserving timestamps, and keeping speaker labels only when the source provides them.
  - Produce `transcript_full` and `transcript_segments[{ startSec, endSec, text, speaker? }]`.
  - Update the existing ES post document with new optional fields: `transcript_status`, `transcript_source`, `transcript_full`, `transcript_segments`, `transcript_language`, `transcript_model_name`, `transcript_version`, `transcript_confidence`, `transcript_error`, `transcript_processed_at`, `embedding_model_name`, `embedding_version`, `embedding_dims`.
  - Update `text` to `description + "\n\nTranscript:\n" + transcript_full` so downstream analysis sees transcript content without retriever changes.
  - Regenerate the existing `embeddings` field from a transcript-first input builder that prioritizes `title`, `transcript_full`, and `description`, truncated by config.

- Elasticsearch and reliability:
  - Extend the posts mapping in `packages/pipelines/src/ingestion/index.ts` with the new optional transcript fields and keep all existing metadata-only documents valid.
  - Add a partial-update helper in `packages/pipelines` that uses ES `update` or bulk `update` against the current weekly document instead of full reindex-only behavior.
  - Status flow is `metadata_only` -> `pending_transcript` -> `processing` -> `completed` or `failed`.
  - Use Trigger retries with exponential backoff, command/API timeouts, structured logs with `postId`, `jobId`, `runId`, `traceId`, and always clean temp files in `finally`.
  - On terminal failure, mark the source doc `failed` and also write a replayable DLQ document to `youtube-transcript-dlq-dev`.

## Test Plan
- Unit test post selection so only top `N` YouTube posts are queued and already-completed/current-version docs are skipped idempotently.
- Unit test subtitle parsing and normalization for duplicate caption fragments, timestamp preservation, and transcript assembly.
- Unit test Together transcription parsing from `verbose_json` into `transcript_full`, `transcript_segments`, and language metadata.
- Unit test ES partial update merging so existing metadata survives, `text` is transcript-enriched, and embedding metadata is versioned.
- Add workflow tests verifying the YouTube collector triggers transcript enrichment asynchronously and does not wait on transcript completion.
- Add regression tests proving metadata-only docs still ingest and existing retriever behavior remains unchanged.

## Assumptions
- This phase is transcript enrichment only. Transcript chunking, chunk embeddings, and retriever/query changes are explicitly deferred because you asked not to touch retrieval.
- The current semantic retriever benefits because the existing document-level `embeddings` field is regenerated from transcript-first text.
- The rollout assumes both the collector flow and transcript worker run with `ARBITER_ES_STAGE=dev` so they read and write the same `posts-dev-*` indices.
- New config defaults are `YOUTUBE_TRANSCRIPT_MAX_PER_RUN=25`, `YOUTUBE_TRANSCRIPT_QUEUE_CONCURRENCY=2`, `YOUTUBE_TRANSCRIPT_VERSION=v1`, and `YOUTUBE_TRANSCRIPT_MODEL=openai/whisper-large-v3`.
````

````text
    "description": "Iran Threatens Global Strikes On U.S., Israel Officials Amid Escalating War #usiranwar #globalstrike #escalatingwar #iranthreat #otvnewsenglish #otvnews --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. OTV being the first private satellite TV channel in Odisha carries the onus of charting a course that behoves its pioneering efforts. Accordingly its charter objectives are FREE, FAIR and UNBIASED.     "transcript_full": "You know, we haven't had peace in the Middle East since Israel was formed.\nMiddle East since Israel was formed. You know that. And yet, we've been\nYou know that. - Timestamp: 24/03/2026 04:30:42 IST
````
- Loaded AGENTS/context wrapper: no
````text
also when is the re-ranking being done in the pipeline like does it only happen when we create the case study or does it happen anywhere else in the pipeline
````

#### Prompt 4
- Timestamp: 24/03/2026 04:32:26 IST
- Loaded AGENTS/context wrapper: no
````text
collector progress reconciliation
does it happen after new data is collected as well??
````

#### Prompt 5
- Timestamp: 24/03/2026 04:33:13 IST
- Loaded AGENTS/context wrapper: no
````text
okay cool also how and for what do we get the transcripts and when do we do it ?
````

#### Prompt 6
- Timestamp: 24/03/2026 04:39:35 IST
- Loaded AGENTS/context wrapper: no
````text
It selects top candidates by interactions, then views, then recency, a
instead of this can we do it on the basis of the re-ranking scores ?? like the highest rankeed posts get the transcripts done for them ? is this possible just answer yes or no 

and 

It gets enqueued after the YouTube collection workflow finishes processing posts, as a non-blocking enrichment step.
Your log confirms that too:
collector finished/enqueued transcripts at 2026-03-24 04:28:48.949+05:30
then individual youtube-transcript-enrichment runs started right after.

can we make it faster like waiting for entire inegstion seems like a bad design as soon as we get high ranked posts during ingestion we should start and save the transcripts can we do that???? 

just answer both of these questions for me now
````

#### Prompt 7
- Timestamp: 24/03/2026 04:41:27 IST
- Loaded AGENTS/context wrapper: no
````text
cool can you please implement both of these correctly , then i will create a case study and see how fast it looks also tell me what is the threshold score you are using so that any thing that and above it gets the transcripts as well as how you implement the better faster parallel processing for our transcripts 

keep in mind to keep the overall design in mind and ensure your changes work perfectly downstream as well
````

#### Prompt 8
- Timestamp: 24/03/2026 04:58:22 IST
- Loaded AGENTS/context wrapper: no
````text
collector pipeline right after ingestion completes in case-study-pipeline.ts. That means each YouTube batch can start transcript jobs as soon as its own posts are ingested, instead of waiting for the whole YouTube collection/pipeline run to finish. I also raised the default transcript queue concurrency from 2 to 4, still overrideable with YOUTUBE_TRANSCRIPT_QUEUE_CONCURRENCY.

so instead of waiting now for each batch we do the trasscripts for those above 0.75 right
````

#### Prompt 9
- Timestamp: 24/03/2026 04:59:02 IST
- Loaded AGENTS/context wrapper: no
````text
increase the threshold to 0.80 please
````

#### Prompt 5
- Timestamp: 24/03/2026 11:10:33 IST
- Loaded AGENTS/context wrapper: no
````text
Also, one important nuance: even when S3 is used, it is the downloaded audio artifact that is uploaded temporarily, not the final transcript text. The transcript text is written back into the stored post via updateStoredPost(...) at youtube-transcript-enrichment.ts (line 1155). The temporary S3 audio upload logs as
is this happening
````

````text
      {
        "text": "Iran-USA-Israel War",
        "label": "event",
        "sentiment": "oppose",
        "emotion": "anger",
        "normalized_text": "iran usa israel war",
        "entity_id": "entity#e9bd316f7749c3f45c3cd7972e5814c884ac809f7295578a409e3b7b34c1f5db",
        "canonical_text": "iran usa israel war"
      }
    ],
    "description": "IRAN-USA-ISRAEL WAR: मध्य पूर्व में जबरदस्त जंग जारी है. आज भी ईरान ने इजरायल पर कई हमले किए हैं. इस बीच ईरान ने बहुत बड़ा दावा किया है. ईरान का कहना है कि उसने अमेरिकी नौसेना ने यूएसएस अब्राहम लिंकन विमानवाहक पोत पर हमला किया है. ईरान ने अमेरिका के इस एयर क्राफ्ट कैरियर पर क्रूज मिसाइल हमले का दावा किया है। अमेरिका की तरफ से इस हमले पर अभी तक कुछ नहीं कहा गया है. इस बार के युद्ध में सबसे खास बात ईरान की मिसाइलें हैं। जिन्हें पूरी तरह रोकने में इजरायल भी कामयाब नहीं हो पा रहा है। वहीं, चौंकाना अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डॉनल्ड ट्रंप का अंदाज है..एक बार फिर उन्होंने दुनिया को चौंकाया है ये कहकर कि ईरान ने उन्हें एक बडा तोहफा दिया है..ऐसे वक्त में जब युद्ध की भीषणता कम नहीं हो रही है और बातचीत को लेकर कोई ठोस नतीजा भी सामने नहीं आया है तब ट्रंप कह रहे हैं कि ईरान ने उन्हें तोहफा भेजा है. IRAN-USA-ISRAEL WAR: A fierce conflict is currently unfolding in the Middle East. Even today, Iran has launched multiple attacks against Israel. Amidst these developments, Iran has made a major claim: it asserts that it has attacked the USS Abraham Lincoln—an aircraft carrier belonging to the U.S. Navy. Iran specifically claims to have carried out a cruise missile strike against this American aircraft carrier. The United States has not yet issued any statement regarding this alleged attack. A standout feature of the current conflict is Iran's missile arsenal, which even Israel has been unable to fully intercept.       },
      {

      },
      {

      },

      },
      {

        "text": "But would you say for sure that it is basically the cluster bombs that they are relying on.",

      {

        "start_sec": 539.03
      },
      {

      {

      {

      {

      },
      {
        "end_sec": 803.43,
        "text": "Some Indian workers are working inside a building being constructed near the area of ​​Israel's capital Tel Aviv where the Iranian missile fell. Let us",

      {

      {

      {

      },
      {

        "start_sec": 815.43
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 820.31,
        "text": "We are from Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh. So you are a resident of Unnao. Prakash,",
        "start_sec": 817.91
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 822.949,

        "start_sec": 820.31
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 826.55,
        "text": "please tell me what happened and at what time did this incident happen? Sir, this incident happened at 7:30 in the morning.",
        "start_sec": 822.949
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 829.67,
        "text": "incident happen? Sir, this incident happened at 7:30 in the morning. We have been working in this building for two years. This has never happened before. This has happened for the",
        "start_sec": 826.55
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 831.11,
        "text": "We have been working in this building for two years. This has never happened before. This has happened for the",

        "text": "first time. So whenever we get a message, we follow safety. This is the",

        "text": "whenever we get a message, we follow safety. This is the",

      {

      {

      },
      {

      {

        "text": "So a lot of what they're firing is cluster bombs. It's actually a war crime. They",

      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2062.71,

      },

        "end_sec": 2065.27,

      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2069.19,
        "text": "up its missile splits to 15 and 20 smaller bombs 7 to 10 kilometers in the",

      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2070.95,
        "text": "smaller bombs 7 to 10 kilometers in the smaller bombs are spread out all over",
        "start_sec": 2069.19
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2073.03,
        "text": "smaller bombs are spread out all over civilian area they do on purpose because they want those",

      {

        "text": "civilian area they do on purpose because they want those smaller bombs.",
        "start_sec": 2073.03
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2082.47,
        "text": "Now how are Iran's cluster bombs causing fire in Israel? So the reason behind this is",
        "start_sec": 2079.75
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2084.55,
        "text": "causing fire in Israel? So the reason behind this is that it is difficult to destroy them in the air. The",
        "start_sec": 2082.47
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2086.79,
        "text": "that it is difficult to destroy them in the air. The missiles open up in the air. It's",
        "start_sec": 2084.55
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2089.03,
        "text": "missiles open up in the air. It's easy to stop a missile. But when it",
        "start_sec": 2086.79
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2091.19,
        "text": "easy to stop a missile. But when it explodes into 80 pieces in mid-air, it becomes",
        "start_sec": 2089.03
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2096.869,
        "text": "explodes into 80 pieces in mid-air, it becomes impossible to track each small bomb.",
        "start_sec": 2091.19
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2102.55,
        "text": "Israel is having to spend its expensive interceptors on Iran's cheap bombs and missiles.",
        "start_sec": 2099.51
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2105.109,
        "text": "cheap bombs and missiles. Because of this, Israel has had to",
        "start_sec": 2102.55
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2108.39,
        "text": "Because of this, Israel has had to demand increased supply from America.",
        "start_sec": 2105.109
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2113.67,
        "text": "demand increased supply from America. Aaj Tak Bureau:",
        "start_sec": 2108.39
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2118.23,
        "text": "I am currently at the place in northern Tel Aviv where an Iranian missile had fallen a few hours ago.",
        "start_sec": 2116.069
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2120.71,
        "text": "where an Iranian missile had fallen a few hours ago.",
        "start_sec": 2118.23
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2128.79,

        "start_sec": 2126.069
      },
      {

      },
      {

      {

      {
        "end_sec": 2285.99,

      {
        "end_sec": 2287.349,

      {

      {

      {
        "end_sec": 2298.87,

      {
        "end_sec": 2302.95,

      {
        "end_sec": 2305.109,
        "text": "Upadhyay, Tel Aviv till date. Some Indian workers are working inside a building being constructed right next to the area in Israel's capital Tel Aviv where the",

      {
        "end_sec": 2307.349,

        "start_sec": 2305.109
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2309.03,
        "text": "Iranian missile fell. Let us",
        "start_sec": 2307.349
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2315.19,
        "text": "try to know from them what they saw? What were the circumstances? What a scene it was when",
        "start_sec": 2312.55
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2317.109,
        "text": "What were the circumstances? What a scene it was when Iran's missile with a warhead of about 100 kg came",
        "start_sec": 2315.19
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2319.349,
        "text": "Iran's missile with a warhead of about 100 kg came here and exploded. What",

      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2320.069,
        "text": "here and exploded. What is your name?",
        "start_sec": 2319.349
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2320.95,
        "text": "is your name? Prakash Chandra.",
        "start_sec": 2320.069
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2321.44,
        "text": "Prakash Chandra. Prakash",
        "start_sec": 2320.95
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2321.75,
        "text": "Prakash ji sir.",
        "start_sec": 2321.44
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2322.79,
        "text": "ji sir. Where are you from?",
        "start_sec": 2321.75
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2325.27,
        "text": "Where are you from? We are from Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh. So",
        "start_sec": 2322.79
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2327.67,
        "text": "We are from Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh. So you are a resident of Unnao. Prakash,",
        "start_sec": 2325.27
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2330.31,
        "text": "you are a resident of Unnao. Prakash, please tell me what happened and at what time did this",
        "start_sec": 2327.67
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2334.069,
        "text": "please tell me what happened and at what time did this incident happen? Sir, this incident happened at 7:30 in the morning.",
        "start_sec": 2330.31
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2337.109,
        "text": "incident happen? Sir, this incident happened at 7:30 in the morning. We have been working in this building for 2 years. This has never happened before. This has happened for the",
        "start_sec": 2334.069
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2338.55,
        "text": "We have been working in this building for 2 years. This has never happened before. This has happened for the",
        "start_sec": 2337.109
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2346.63,
        "text": "first time. So whenever we get a message, we follow safety. This is the",
        "start_sec": 2344.23
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2347.99,
        "text": "whenever we get a message, we follow safety. This is the",
        "start_sec": 2346.63
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2351.43,
        "text": "first time this has happened to us. So we went down to the basement,",
        "start_sec": 2350.15
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2353.19,
        "text": "basement, two floors below,",
        "start_sec": 2351.43
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2356.87,
        "text": "two floors below, and there was a loud explosion. Some people were upstairs.",
        "start_sec": 2353.19
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2357.829,
        "text": "and there was a loud explosion. Some people were upstairs.",
        "start_sec": 2356.87
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2363.109,
        "text": "Some of us do not follow safety. We went down with complete safety.",
        "start_sec": 2359.99
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2365.349,
        "text": "complete safety. So when the missile fell here, later",
        "start_sec": 2363.109
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2367.75,
        "text": "So when the missile fell here, later when we got a message on our mobile to come out,",
        "start_sec": 2365.349
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2386.069,
        "text": "when we got a message on our mobile to come out, then we would come out.",
        "start_sec": 2367.75
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2393.51,
        "text": "They have no navy left They have no air force left They have no aircraft",
        "start_sec": 2390.87
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2396.23,

      },

      {

        "text": "right People have no idea want to make a",

      {

      },
      {

      },
      {

      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2422.47,
        "text": "Iran runs out of missiles. Iran's leader is finished. Iran is completely devastated.",
        "start_sec": 2418.95
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2425.43,
        "text": "Iran's leader is finished. Iran is completely devastated. Iran is completely on its knees. Iran is pleading. He is",
        "start_sec": 2422.47
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2428.31,
        "text": "Iran is completely on its knees. Iran is pleading. He is pleading. Getting ready for cease fire.",
        "start_sec": 2425.43
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2430.55,
        "text": "pleading. Getting ready for cease fire. Because he has no other",
        "start_sec": 2428.31
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2435.829,

        "start_sec": 2430.55
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2440.79,

      {

      {
        "end_sec": 2451.91,
        "text": "well and now we are having one in",
        "start_sec": 2449.75
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2454.71,
        "text": "in Trump is used to making such sky-high claims. It has been",
        "start_sec": 2451.91
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2457.829,
        "text": "Trump is used to making such sky-high claims. It has been his nature to speak excessively.",
        "start_sec": 2454.71
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2459.829,
        "text": "his nature to speak excessively. But today he has made a big claim",
        "start_sec": 2457.829
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2462.71,
        "text": "But today he has made a big claim which, if true, can prove to be a milestone towards peace in this war.",
        "start_sec": 2459.829
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2465.43,
        "text": "which, if true, can prove to be a milestone towards peace in this war.",
        "start_sec": 2462.71
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2481.27,
        "text": "yesterday was actually a present and the present today was a very big present, a tremendous",
        "start_sec": 2476.55
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2485.349,
        "text": "present and the present today was a very big present, a tremendous amount of money and I'm not going to",
        "start_sec": 2481.27
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2487.67,
        "text": "amount of money and I'm not going to tell you what the present is, but it was a",
        "start_sec": 2485.349
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2492.63,
        "text": "tell you what the present is, but it was a very significant",
        "start_sec": 2487.67
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2498.55,
        "text": "price and they gave it to us, they said they gave it, so that's one thing to me with the right",
        "start_sec": 2495.829
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2499.91,
        "text": "to me with the right people.",
        "start_sec": 2498.55
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2502.47,
        "text": "people. So Iran, for whom Trump is a thorn in the eye at this time. If",
        "start_sec": 2499.91
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2504.95,
        "text": "So Iran, for whom Trump is a thorn in the eye at this time. If Trump is to be believed,",
        "start_sec": 2502.47
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2507.75,
        "text": "Trump is to be believed, he has received the gift from the same Iran. That",
        "start_sec": 2504.95
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2510.79,
        "text": "he has received the gift from the same Iran. That too is not just any other thing. Very large and very",
        "start_sec": 2507.75
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2513.99,
        "text": "too is not just any other thing. Very large and very valuable. So what is that gift after all?",
        "start_sec": 2510.79
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2518.39,
        "text": "valuable. So what is that gift after all? You should also hear the answer to this from Trump himself.",
        "start_sec": 2513.99
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2526.55,
        "text": "No wire wall and gas related things are happening to the",
        "start_sec": 2520.47
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2529.51,
        "text": "wall and gas related things are happening to the people",
        "start_sec": 2526.55
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2533.349,
        "text": "people or to the flow,",
        "start_sec": 2529.51
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2536.15,
        "text": "or to the flow, so Trump is saying that the gift from Iran",
        "start_sec": 2533.349
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2539.43,
        "text": "so Trump is saying that the gift from Iran is regarding Horbus, so will Iran",
        "start_sec": 2536.15
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2542.79,
        "text": "is regarding Horbus, so will Iran lift the sanctions on Hormus, will the oil supply",
        "start_sec": 2539.43
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2545.99,
        "text": "lift the sanctions on Hormus, will the oil supply start from Hormus, will the oil crisis end from the world.",
        "start_sec": 2542.79
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2549.99,
        "text": "start from Hormus, will the oil crisis end from the world. Everyone knows that Horboz",
        "start_sec": 2545.99
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2552.95,
        "text": "Everyone knows that Horboz is the trump card for Iran which can force even a powerful leader like Trump to",
        "start_sec": 2549.99
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2555.91,
        "text": "is the trump card for Iran which can force even a powerful leader like Trump to come to the base of agreement.",
        "start_sec": 2552.95
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2558.309,
        "text": "come to the base of agreement. If Iran",
        "start_sec": 2555.91
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2561.109,
        "text": "If Iran agrees to lift the ban on movement of ships from Iran, then it will",
        "start_sec": 2558.309
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2563.91,
        "text": "agrees to lift the ban on movement of ships from Iran, then it will definitely",
        "start_sec": 2561.109
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2566.71,
        "text": "definitely want to charge a heavy price in return. Whereas Trump is still",
        "start_sec": 2563.91
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2569.349,
        "text": "want to charge a heavy price in return. Whereas Trump is still adamant on his old conditions. In such a situation,",
        "start_sec": 2566.71
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2573.109,
        "text": "adamant on his old conditions. In such a situation, how is this possible? This is a big knot. Aaj Tak",
        "start_sec": 2569.349
      },
      {
        "end_sec": 2588.15,
        "text": "how is this possible? This is a big knot. Aaj Tak Bureau",
        "start_sec": 2573.109
      }
    ],
    "transcript_model_name": "yt-dlp-subtitles",
    "transcript_source": "subtitles"
  },

    "description": [
      "IRAN-USA-ISRAEL WAR: मध्य पूर्व में जबरदस्त जंग जारी है. आज भी ईरान ने इजरायल पर कई हमले किए हैं. इस बीच ईरान ने बहुत बड़ा दावा किया है. ईरान का कहना है कि उसने अमेरिकी नौसेना ने यूएसएस अब्राहम लिंकन विमानवाहक पोत पर हमला किया है. ईरान ने अमेरिका के इस एयर क्राफ्ट कैरियर पर क्रूज मिसाइल हमले का दावा किया है। अमेरिका की तरफ से इस हमले पर अभी तक कुछ नहीं कहा गया है. इस बार के युद्ध में सबसे खास बात ईरान की मिसाइलें हैं। जिन्हें पूरी तरह रोकने में इजरायल भी कामयाब नहीं हो पा रहा है। वहीं, चौंकाना अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डॉनल्ड ट्रंप का अंदाज है..एक बार फिर उन्होंने दुनिया को चौंकाया है ये कहकर कि ईरान ने उन्हें एक बडा तोहफा दिया है..ऐसे वक्त में जब युद्ध की भीषणता कम नहीं हो रही है और बातचीत को लेकर कोई ठोस नतीजा भी सामने नहीं आया है तब ट्रंप कह रहे हैं कि ईरान ने उन्हें तोहफा भेजा है. IRAN-USA-ISRAEL WAR: A fierce conflict is currently unfolding in the Middle East. Even today, Iran has launched multiple attacks against Israel. Amidst these developments, Iran has made a major claim: it asserts that it has attacked the USS Abraham Lincoln—an aircraft carrier belonging to the U.S. Navy. Iran specifically claims to have carried out a cruise missile strike against this American aircraft carrier. The United States has not yet issued any statement regarding this alleged attack.           "launched a wave of attacks on Israel and is carrying out attacks under Operation True Promise, on the"
        ],

          112.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          109.35
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "attacks under Operation True Promise, on the other hand it is targeting American bases"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          114.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          112.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "other hand it is targeting American bases in the Middle East countries, and at the same time, an"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          116.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          114.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "in the Middle East countries, and at the same time, an"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          118.789
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          116.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "news of a major attack has also come to light in Iraq and the western region of Iraq, Anbar, has been attacked. Where seven"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          145.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          143.51
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "region of Iraq, Anbar, has been attacked. Where seven Iraqi soldiers were killed. While more than 13"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          147.83
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          145.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Iraqi soldiers were killed. While more than 13 fighters were injured in this. Now"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          150.309
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          147.83
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "fighters were injured in this. Now according to the Iraqi army, this attack took place in the morning. The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          152.63
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          150.309
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "according to the Iraqi army, this attack took place in the morning. The attack was claimed to have been on a military clinic and a nearby"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          154.949
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          152.63
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "attack was claimed to have been on a military clinic and a nearby engineering unit."
        ],

          157.35
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          154.949
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "engineering unit. And what is the most special thing in this war"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          159.35
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          157.35
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "And what is the most special thing in this war ? The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          161.83
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          159.35
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "? The entire world and the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          164.63
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          161.83
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "entire world and the country as a whole seem to be failing to stop the missiles that Iran is using."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          166.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          164.63
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "country as a whole seem to be failing to stop the missiles that Iran is using."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          171.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          166.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Iron to David Sling, Aerosyst, Patriarch and Third."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          178.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          175.35
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Patriarch and Third. This time Iran has put a question mark on the security of Israel, which has a security circle of five-P air defense system."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          180.949
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          178.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "This time Iran has put a question mark on the security of Israel, which has a security circle of five-P air defense system."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          183.35
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          180.949
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

          195.11
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          192.869
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "remind you of Ukraine. Iranian attacks on Israel's capital have not"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          197.509
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          195.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Iranian attacks on Israel's capital have not only weakened buildings here."
        ],

          199.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          197.509
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          199.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],

          204.07
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          201.589
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "end_sec": [

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          208.39
        ]
      },
      {

        ],
        "end_sec": [

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          210.869
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "really know. Just listening to whatever comments we get and we are doing what ever we need to do in order to"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          218.309
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          215.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "end_sec": [
          221.99
        ],
        "start_sec": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "protect ourselves but we know we need luck also you need luck just"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          230.07
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          221.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "imagine the common man of Israel has left himself at the mercy of fate in this war because"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          234.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          232.47
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "left himself at the mercy of fate in this war because he knows that the air defense installed for the protection of Israel is"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          236.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          234.71
        ]
      },
      {

        ],

          239.11
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          236.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "only 90% effective in stopping ballistic missiles. The remaining 10% of attacks are very difficult to stop."

        "end_sec": [
          247.03
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          242.63
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "You Can See It's a One War of Missal That Exploded in the Middle of the Road. It"
        ],
        "end_sec": [

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          253.03
        ]
      },
      {

          260.629
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          255.67
        ]
      },
      {

          "explodes above cars and makes a big all in the ground. And there is a big"

        "start_sec": [

      },
      {
        "text": [
          "ground. And there is a big damage to the building"

        "end_sec": [
          266.469
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          263.67
        ]
      },
      {

        ],
        "end_sec": [
          271.27
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          266.469
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "near the explosion. Ah it's we estimate it's something like 100 kilograms of ah ah"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          274.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          271.27
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "100 kilograms of ah ah war ad that they exploded ah ah in this"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          278.07
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          274.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "war ad that they exploded ah ah in this incident."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          285.749
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          278.07
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Iran's missiles hitting Israel's Dimona on Saturday shocked everyone. The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          290.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          287.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "shocked everyone. The reason for this is Israel's nuclear research center in Dimona."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          292.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          290.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "reason for this is Israel's nuclear research center in Dimona. Whose security is the strongest in Israel."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          295.11
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          292.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Whose security is the strongest in Israel."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          298.87
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          295.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "But here, within 3 hours, two Iranian missiles caused massive destruction and"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          303.99
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          301.27
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "missiles caused massive destruction and put a question mark on Israel's air defense system. The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          306.39
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          303.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "put a question mark on Israel's air defense system. The situation is such that people in Israel are scared. Nobody wants what's"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          308.95
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          306.39
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "situation is such that people in Israel are scared. Nobody wants what's"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          310.07
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          308.95
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "going on, but I think we need to do what we need to do in"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          316.07
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          313.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "we need to do what we need to do in order to have a safe life. Like we had"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          320.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          316.07
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "order to have a safe life. Like we had 50 years ago like something like this because to be"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          323.029
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          320.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "50 years ago like something like this because to be honest I have kids they are 24 21"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          327.189
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          323.029
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "honest I have kids they are 24 21 15 I want to have grand children also so we want to be in a"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          330.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          327.189
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "15 I want to have grand children also so we want to be in a nice and safe"
````
