        "end_sec": [
          333.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          330.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "nice and safe atmosphere to leave at the end of the day."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          339.83
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          333.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu, who arrived after the missile attack on the city of Demonar Ara, also warned his people"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          346.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          344.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "warned his people not to remain careless. There was a"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          347.99
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          346.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "not to remain careless. There was a"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          349.27
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          347.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "full 10 minutes between receiving the warning and the missile hitting the target. The missile fell between the buildings here."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          356.469
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          353.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "fell between the buildings here. If during that time everyone had gone to the shelters built under every house in the safe area, no"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          358.95
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          356.469
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "If during that time everyone had gone to the shelters built under every house in the safe area, no"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          361.029
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          358.95
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "one would have been injured. I urge all of you, brothers and sisters, citizens of Israel, to"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          366.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          363.83
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "brothers and sisters, citizens of Israel, to go to a safe area. As soon as you"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          368.469
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          366.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "go to a safe area. As soon as you hear the siren, go straight to a safe area."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          370.87
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          368.469
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "hear the siren, go straight to a safe area."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          373.11
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          370.87
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "And with God's help we will all save our lives. The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          381.029
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          375.43
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "famous Iron Dome missile defense system is designed to intercept Hamas' short-range missiles. The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          385.51
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          383.83
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "to intercept Hamas' short-range missiles. The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          387.43
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          385.51
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "responsibility of intercepting ballistic missiles lies on the shoulders of Arrow Two. It is believed that he was"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          391.83
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          389.749
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "that he was not posted in Divona when the attack took place on Sunday. That's why there was"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          393.83
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          391.83
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "not posted in Divona when the attack took place on Sunday. That's why there was so much destruction there."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          398.39
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          393.83
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "But there is also the question of Iran's missiles, which appear to be"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          403.43
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          400.87
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "which appear to be better prepared against Israel than ever before."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          405.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          403.43
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "better prepared against Israel than ever before."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          410.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          405.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Look at this picture in which the cluster bomb fired by Iran is moving forward, dodging Israel's air defense."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          414.87
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          412.469
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "cluster bomb fired by Iran is moving forward, dodging Israel's air defense."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          417.43
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          414.87
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Iran's cluster missiles, which explode a few kilometers above the ground, are proving to be the most lethal."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          422.07
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          419.51
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "proving to be the most lethal."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          423.189
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          422.07
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "I'm standing in the area on television where"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          426.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          425.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "where a house has been damaged by sustained Iranian attacks."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          429.99
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          426.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "a house has been damaged by sustained Iranian attacks. Now"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          432.39
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          429.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Now look at that impact here on the road. You"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          434.87
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          432.39
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "look at that impact here on the road. You can see small craters throughout and along with that,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          437.83
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          434.87
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "can see small craters throughout and along with that, a completely burnt house above. But"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          440.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          437.83
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "a completely burnt house above. But it is also worth noting that"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          443.35
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          440.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "it is also worth noting that even though one house has burnt down,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          445.749
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          443.35
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "even though one house has burnt down, you do"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          448.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          445.749
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "you do not see the same amount of damage in the rest of the apartments."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          450.309
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          448.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "not see the same amount of damage in the rest of the apartments. Just the glasses of this shop that you see behind me were"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          454.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          450.309
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Just the glasses of this shop that you see behind me were"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          456.39
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          454.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "broken and scattered, which is currently being repaired here. So"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          461.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          458.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "currently being repaired here. So other than that, you don't see much damage, and the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          464.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          461.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "other than that, you don't see much damage, and the authorities here say"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          465.909
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          464.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "authorities here say that this wasn't a missile attack of that kind,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          468.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          465.909
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "that this wasn't a missile attack of that kind, but rather an attack caused by cluster bombs."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          470.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          468.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "but rather an attack caused by cluster bombs. Around 101 bombs were scattered in this entire area"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          475.11
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          470.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Around 101 bombs were scattered in this entire area and"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          478.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          475.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and due to their impact, this damage has occurred here."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          481.189
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          478.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "due to their impact, this damage has occurred here."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          485.27
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          481.189
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Iran has now made cluster bombs a common weapon in attacks on Israel. Iran has so"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          489.749
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          487.589
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Iran has so far fired around 300 ballistic missiles. Of"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          492.23
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          489.749
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "far fired around 300 ballistic missiles. Of which about half were equipped with cluster warheads."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          494.869
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          492.23
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "which about half were equipped with cluster warheads."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          498.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          494.869
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Missiles like Iran's Khurram Shahr are simultaneously dropping small bombs that can reach up to 8 km. Do"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          503.909
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          501.189
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "dropping small bombs that can reach up to 8 km. Do not leave anyone within the scope of."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          506.23
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          503.909
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "not leave anyone within the scope of. Can cause havoc everywhere. Can target multiple targets simultaneously."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          509.11
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          506.23
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Can cause havoc everywhere. Can target multiple targets simultaneously."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          511.029
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          509.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "How to Act They Try to Target Civilian Areas. And they are doing that everywhere,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          515.43
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          513.43
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Areas. And they are doing that everywhere, not just in Israel but all across the Middle"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          517.269
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          515.43
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "not just in Israel but all across the Middle East."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          517.99
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          517.269
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "East. But would you say for sure that it is basically"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          520.949
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          517.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "But would you say for sure that it is basically the cluster bombs that they are relying on."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          522.709
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          520.949
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "the cluster bombs that they are relying on. So a lot of what they're firing is"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          524.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          522.709
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "So a lot of what they're firing is cluster bombs. It's actually a war crime, they"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          526.23
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          524.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "cluster bombs. It's actually a war crime, they fire cluster bombs, its missile"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          529.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          526.23
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "fire cluster bombs, its missile splits 15 bombs into 10, the smaller"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          535.19
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          529.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "splits 15 bombs into 10, the smaller bombs are spread out all over civilian"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          537.03
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          535.19
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "bombs are spread out all over civilian areas, they do it on purpose because they want those"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          539.03
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          537.03
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "areas, they do it on purpose because they want those smaller bombs."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          542.87
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          539.03
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Now how are Iran's cluster bombs causing fire in Israel? So the reason behind this is"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          548.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          545.43
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "causing fire in Israel? So the reason behind this is that it is difficult to destroy them in the air. The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          550.23
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          548.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "that it is difficult to destroy them in the air. The missiles open up in the air. It's"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          552.389
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          550.23
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "missiles open up in the air. It's easy to stop a missile. But when it"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          554.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          552.389
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "easy to stop a missile. But when it breaks into 80 pieces in the air, it is almost"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          556.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          554.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "breaks into 80 pieces in the air, it is almost impossible to track each small bomb."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          562.47
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          556.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Israel is having to spend its expensive interceptors on Iran's cheap bombs and missiles."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          568.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          565.19
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "cheap bombs and missiles. Because of this, Israel has had to"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          570.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          568.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Because of this, Israel has had to demand increased supply from America. The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          573.99
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          570.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "demand increased supply from America. The Bureau has"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          579.03
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          573.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "alerted the Israeli public to the Israeli National Security Council ahead of the spring holidays. The message sent said that Iran would"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          587.99
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          585.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "said that Iran would intensify attacks on Israeli targets abroad."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          590.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          587.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "intensify attacks on Israeli targets abroad. Iran's attacks inside Israel will also increase."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          595.19
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          590.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "I am currently at the site in northern Tel Aviv where an Iranian missile landed a few hours ago."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          599.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          597.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "where an Iranian missile landed a few hours ago."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          602.23
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          599.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "What was the outcome and impact of the fall of this missile with a warhead of about 100 kg? Let me show you that first. Look, this is the building"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          610.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          607.59
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Look, this is the building which was damaged by the missile blast."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          612.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          610.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "which was damaged by the missile blast. You can see how this"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          615.19
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          612.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "You can see how this building has been damaged. This is a densely populated"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          617.19
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          615.19
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "building has been damaged. This is a densely populated area. These two buildings have been"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          619.35
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          617.19
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "area. These two buildings have been most impacted. However,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          621.11
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          619.35
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "most impacted. However,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          623.35
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          621.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "teams of Israel's emergency services are present here and all these staff are busy cleaning this place. There"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          627.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          625.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "busy cleaning this place. There is a system within Israel. As soon as"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          629.59
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          627.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "is a system within Israel. As soon as this type of rocket or bomb falls at any place."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          631.43
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          629.59
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "this type of rocket or bomb falls at any place. Some kind of missile falls."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          633.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          631.43
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Some kind of missile falls. The place is immediately cleaned and"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          635.99
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          633.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "The place is immediately cleaned and done within a few hours in such a way"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          637.59
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          635.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "done within a few hours in such a way that people do not feel that"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          639.59
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          637.59
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "that people do not feel that such a thing was present there. The relief here was"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          641.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          639.59
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "such a thing was present there. The relief here was that people had already received the alert."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          644.389
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          641.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "that people had already received the alert. Most of the people were"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          646.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          644.389
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Most of the people were inside bomb shelters and hence the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          647.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          646.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "inside bomb shelters and hence the damage was less. Only six people are"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          649.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          647.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "damage was less. Only six people are reported to be injured in this and they too have"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          652.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          649.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "reported to be injured in this and they too have not suffered any major damage."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          654.47
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          652.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "not suffered any major damage. But the buildings and the vehicles"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          656.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          654.47
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "But the buildings and the vehicles in this entire area have been badly damaged."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          658.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          656.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "in this entire area have been badly damaged. You can see how"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          661.43
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          658.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "You can see how strong and how light each one is. Just"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          663.35
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          661.43
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "strong and how light each one is. Just look at these pictures again. Look, this"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          665.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          663.35
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "look at these pictures again. Look, this building is almost a three-storey"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          668.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          665.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "building is almost a three-storey building and many of the balconies of this three-storey building have been"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          671.03
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          668.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "building and many of the balconies of this three-storey building have been"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          673.269
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          671.03
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "completely destroyed. Has fallen down. Apart from this, the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          677.269
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          675.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "fallen down. Apart from this, the glasses in this nearby building are also"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          680.389
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          677.269
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "glasses in this nearby building are also broken. They are cracked. People from many areas"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          683.509
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          680.389
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "broken. They are cracked. People from many areas who were here and were inside the bomb shelter at that time have"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          685.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          683.509
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "who were here and were inside the bomb shelter at that time have now returned to their homes."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          687.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          685.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "now returned to their homes. So at this time those pieces of glass are being"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          689.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          687.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "So at this time those pieces of glass are being cleaned."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          691.509
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          689.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "cleaned. Look, this person is"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          693.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          691.509
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Look, this person is visible here peeping through this broken glass. And"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          696.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          693.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "visible here peeping through this broken glass. And these glasses are being removed. The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          699.11
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          696.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "these glasses are being removed. The emergency staff is also busy working here."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          701.43
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          699.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "emergency staff is also busy working here. Also, the family members are"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          703.269
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          701.43
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Also, the family members are also"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          705.43
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          703.269
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "also removing the sharpness of those things which can cause harm."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          707.91
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          705.43
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "removing the sharpness of those things which can cause harm. However, no one has left their homes"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          710.23
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          707.91
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "However, no one has left their homes and most of the people"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          712.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          710.23
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and most of the people are present here. But to help the people, such"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          715.269
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          712.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "are present here. But to help the people, such relief camps or"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          717.43
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          715.269
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "relief camps or help booths have also been set up here and"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          719.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          717.43
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "help booths have also been set up here and along with this, the security"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          722.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          719.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "along with this, the security personnel are also present here in large numbers"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          723.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          722.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "personnel are also present here in large numbers and along with this, the emergency service"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          725.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          723.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and along with this, the emergency service squads are continuously clearing the debris here"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          728.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          725.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "squads are continuously clearing the debris here and that debris is being continuously"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          730.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          728.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and that debris is being continuously removed through vehicles and along with this, the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          732.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          730.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "removed through vehicles and along with this, the pit at the place where the missile had fallen is also being"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          735.99
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          732.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "pit at the place where the missile had fallen is also being filled there. This is an impact site."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          738.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          735.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "filled there. This is an impact site. The place where you are seeing these Bakhos"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          741.91
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          738.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "The place where you are seeing these Bakhos or these bulldozers and these Kan,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          744.389
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          741.91
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "or these bulldozers and these Kan, this is the place where that missile had fallen"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          747.509
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          744.389
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "this is the place where that missile had fallen and due to the impact of that missile,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          749.59
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          747.509
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and due to the impact of that missile, a huge crater has been created here"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          751.59
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          749.59
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "a huge crater has been created here and that crater is now being filled immediately."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          753.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          751.59
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and that crater is now being filled immediately. Also, the surrounding areas which"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          756.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          753.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Also, the surrounding areas which can be repaired are being repaired"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          758.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          756.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "can be repaired are being repaired and the people who have been injured have been"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          761.35
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          758.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and the people who have been injured have been sent to safe places"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          763.269
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          761.35
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "sent to safe places and this is the reality of ground zero."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          766.389
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          763.269
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and this is the reality of ground zero. In any war, any battle,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          767.99
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          766.389
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "In any war, any battle, any conflict, the biggest loss is suffered"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          769.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          767.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "any conflict, the biggest loss is suffered by the common man and the common"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          771.91
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          769.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "by the common man and the common man's home gets destroyed. It is his dreams that are shattered"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          774.949
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          771.91
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "man's home gets destroyed. It is his dreams that are shattered and this is a very bitter and dark truth of"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          777.59
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          774.949
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and this is a very bitter and dark truth of any war, any battle, any"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          779.19
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          777.59
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "any war, any battle, any struggle. Pranay Upadhyay Oil till date."
        ],

        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "struggle. Pranay Upadhyay Oil till date."

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          782.389
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "You saw Pranay's report from Israel because there are continuous attacks there."

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          786.069
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "because there are continuous attacks there. Iran is continuously attacking Tel Aviv and"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          789.269
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          787.509
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Iran is continuously attacking Tel Aviv and two eyewitnesses"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          791.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          789.269
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "two eyewitnesses spoke to our correspondent Pranay Upadhyay regarding one such attack."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          793.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          791.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "spoke to our correspondent Pranay Upadhyay regarding one such attack."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          794.87
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          793.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Some Indian workers are working inside a building being constructed near the area of ​​Israel's capital Tel Aviv where the Iranian missile fell. Let us"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          803.43
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          801.59
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "try to know from them what they saw? What were the circumstances? What a scene it was when"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          807.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          805.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "What were the circumstances? What a scene it was when Iran's missile with a warhead of about 100 kg came"

        "end_sec": [
          809.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          807.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],

          809.67
        ]
      },

      },

        ],

        ]

        ],

          814.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [

        ]
      },

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          814.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          815.43
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          817.91
        ]
      },
      {

          822.949
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          820.31
        ]
      },
      {

        ],
        "end_sec": [
          826.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          822.949
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "end_sec": [

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          826.55
        ]
      },
      {

        ],

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          829.67
        ]
      },

        ],

        ]
      },

          839.189
        ]
      },

      },

        ]
      },
      {

        ]

        ],

          961.749
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

          969.269
        ],

          964.069
        ]
      },
      {

        ],
        "end_sec": [
          974.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          971.749
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Border Is Great. The Military Is Great. We are having tremendous success by the way we had one in"

          977.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          974.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          977.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

          988.23
        ]

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          991.35
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          993.43
        ]
      },
      {

        "start_sec": [
          996.31
        ]
      },

      },

        ]

        ],

        ]

      },

          1079.029
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

      },

        ]
      },

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          1099.35
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        "start_sec": [
          1101.83
        ]
      },
      {

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          1105.029
        ]
      },
      {

        "start_sec": [

        ]
      },
      {

        "start_sec": [
          1115.83
        ]
      },
      {

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          1117.83
        ]
      },
      {

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          1119.35
        ]
      },
      {

        ]
      },
      {

        ],

        ]

        ]

      },

      },

        ]

        ]
      },

        ]
      },

        ]
      },

          1984.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          1982.47
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "n't see the same level of damage in the rest of the apartments. Just the glasses of this shop that you see behind me were"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          1988.549
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          1984.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Just the glasses of this shop that you see behind me were"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          1990.789
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          1988.549
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "broken and scattered, which is currently being repaired here. So"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          1996.07
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          1993.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "currently being repaired here. So other than that, you don't see much damage, and the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          1998.47
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          1996.07
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "other than that, you don't see much damage, and the authorities here say"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2000.23
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          1998.47
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "authorities here say that this wasn't a missile attack of that kind,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2002.87
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2000.23
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "that this wasn't a missile attack of that kind, but rather an attack caused by cluster bombs."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2005.11
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2002.87
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "but rather an attack caused by cluster bombs. Around 101 bombs were scattered in this entire area"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2009.509
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2005.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Around 101 bombs were scattered in this entire area and"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2013.11
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2009.509
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and due to their impact, this damage has occurred here."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2015.59
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2013.11
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "due to their impact, this damage has occurred here."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2019.669
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2015.59
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Iran has now made cluster bombs a common weapon in attacks on Israel. Iran has so"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2024.149
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2021.909
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Iran has so far fired around 300 ballistic missiles. Of"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2026.63
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2024.149
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "far fired around 300 ballistic missiles. Of which about half were equipped with cluster warheads."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2029.269
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2026.63
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "which about half were equipped with cluster warheads."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2033.11
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2029.269
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Missiles like Iran's Khurram Shahr are simultaneously dropping small bombs that can reach up to 8 km. Do"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2038.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2035.59
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "dropping small bombs that can reach up to 8 km. Do not leave anyone within the scope of."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2040.549
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2038.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "not leave anyone within the scope of. Can cause havoc everywhere. Can target multiple targets simultaneously."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2043.509
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2040.549
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Can cause havoc everywhere. Can target multiple targets simultaneously. How to Act They"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2046.549
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2043.509
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "How to Act They Try to Target Civilian Areas. And they are doing that"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2048.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2046.549
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Try to Target Civilian Areas. And they are doing that everywhere, not just in Israel"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2050.629
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2048.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "everywhere, not just in Israel but all across the Middle East."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2052.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2050.629
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "but all across the Middle East. But would you say for sure that it is basically"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2055.27
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2052.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "But would you say for sure that it is basically the cluster bombs that they are relying on."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2057.109
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2055.27
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "the cluster bombs that they are relying on. So a lot of what they're firing is cluster"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2059.03
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2057.109
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "So a lot of what they're firing is cluster bombs. It's actually a war crime. They"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2060.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2059.03
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "bombs. It's actually a war crime. They fire and cluster bombs you know split"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2062.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2060.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "fire and cluster bombs you know split up its missile splits to 15 and 20"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2065.27
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2062.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "up its missile splits to 15 and 20 smaller bombs 7 to 10 kilometers in the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2069.19
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2065.27
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "smaller bombs 7 to 10 kilometers in the smaller bombs are spread out all over"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2070.95
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2069.19
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "smaller bombs are spread out all over civilian area they do on purpose because they want those"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2073.03
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2070.95
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "civilian area they do on purpose because they want those smaller bombs."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2077.27
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2073.03
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Now how are Iran's cluster bombs causing fire in Israel? So the reason behind this is"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2082.47
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2079.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "causing fire in Israel? So the reason behind this is that it is difficult to destroy them in the air. The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2084.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2082.47
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "that it is difficult to destroy them in the air. The missiles open up in the air. It's"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2086.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2084.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "missiles open up in the air. It's easy to stop a missile. But when it"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2089.03
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2086.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "easy to stop a missile. But when it explodes into 80 pieces in mid-air, it becomes"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2091.19
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2089.03
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "explodes into 80 pieces in mid-air, it becomes impossible to track each small bomb."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2096.869
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2091.19
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Israel is having to spend its expensive interceptors on Iran's cheap bombs and missiles."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2102.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2099.51
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "cheap bombs and missiles. Because of this, Israel has had to"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2105.109
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2102.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Because of this, Israel has had to demand increased supply from America."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2108.39
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2105.109
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "demand increased supply from America. Aaj Tak Bureau:"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2113.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2108.39
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "I am currently at the place in northern Tel Aviv where an Iranian missile had fallen a few hours ago."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2118.23
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2116.069
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "where an Iranian missile had fallen a few hours ago."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2120.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2118.23
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "What was the outcome and impact of the fall of this missile with a warhead of about 100 kg? Let me show you that first. Look, this is the building"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2128.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2126.069
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Look, this is the building which was damaged by the missile blast."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2131.03
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2128.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "which was damaged by the missile blast. You can see how this"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2133.589
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2131.03
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "You can see how this building was damaged. This"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2135.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2133.589
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "building was damaged. This is a densely populated area. These two buildings have been"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2137.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2135.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "is a densely populated area. These two buildings have been affected the most. However, the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2139.589
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2137.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "affected the most. However, the Israeli Emergency Service teams are"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2142.069
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2139.589
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Israeli Emergency Service teams are present here and all these staff are"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2144.39
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2142.069
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "present here and all these staff are busy cleaning this place. There"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2146.63
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2144.39
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "busy cleaning this place. There is a system within Israel. As soon as"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2148.47
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2146.63
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "is a system within Israel. As soon as this type of rocket or bomb falls at any place."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2150.47
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2148.47
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "this type of rocket or bomb falls at any place. Some kind of missile falls. The place is"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2152.87
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2150.47
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Some kind of missile falls. The place is cleaned immediately and is done"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2154.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2152.87
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "cleaned immediately and is done within a few hours in such a way that"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2156.63
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2154.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "within a few hours in such a way that people do not feel that such a"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2158.47
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2156.63
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "people do not feel that such a leak had occurred there. The relief here was"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2160.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2158.47
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "leak had occurred there. The relief here was that people had already received the alert."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2163.03
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2160.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "that people had already received the alert. Most of the people were inside bomb shelters"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2165.109
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2163.03
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Most of the people were inside bomb shelters and hence the damage was less."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2167.109
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2165.109
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and hence the damage was less. Only six people are reported to be injured in this"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2169.109
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2167.109
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Only six people are reported to be injured in this and they too have"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2171.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2169.109
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and they too have not suffered any major damage. But the buildings"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2174.069
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2171.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "not suffered any major damage. But the buildings and the vehicles in this entire area have been"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2176.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2174.069
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and the vehicles in this entire area have been badly damaged. You can see"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2178.47
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2176.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "badly damaged. You can see who is stronger and who is lighter. Just"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2181.109
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2178.47
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "who is stronger and who is lighter. Just look at these pictures again."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2182.95
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2181.109
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "look at these pictures again. Look, this building is almost a"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2186.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2182.95
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Look, this building is almost a three-storey building and"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2188.23
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2186.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "three-storey building and many of the balconies of this three-storey building have been"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2191.27
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2188.23
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "many of the balconies of this three-storey building have been completely destroyed. Has"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2193.109
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2191.27
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "completely destroyed. Has fallen down. Apart from this, the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2194.87
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2193.109
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "fallen down. Apart from this, the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2197.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2194.87
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "glasses in this nearby building are also broken. They are cracked. People from many areas who were here and were"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2203.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2200.63
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "People from many areas who were here and were inside the bomb shelter at that time have now returned to their"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2205.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2203.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "inside the bomb shelter at that time have now returned to their homes. So at this time those pieces of glass are being"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2207.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2205.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "homes. So at this time those pieces of glass are being cleaned."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2209.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2207.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "cleaned. Look, this person is"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2211.91
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2209.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Look, this person is visible here peeping through this broken glass."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2214.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2211.91
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "visible here peeping through this broken glass. And these glasses are being removed. The"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2217.51
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2214.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "And these glasses are being removed. The emergency staff is also busy working here."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2219.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2217.51
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "emergency staff is also busy working here. Also, the family members"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2221.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2219.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Also, the family members here are also removing those things and"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2223.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2221.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "here are also removing those things and sharpeners which can cause harm."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2226.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2223.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "sharpeners which can cause harm. However, no one has left their homes"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2228.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2226.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "However, no one has left their homes and most of the people"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2231.03
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2228.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and most of the people are present here. But to help the people, such"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2233.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2231.03
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "are present here. But to help the people, such relief camps or"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2235.91
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2233.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "relief camps or help booths have also been set up here and"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2238.23
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2235.91
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "help booths have also been set up here and along with this, the security"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2240.63
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2238.23
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "along with this, the security personnel are also present here in large numbers"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2242.23
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2240.63
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "personnel are also present here in large numbers and along with this, the emergency service"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2244.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2242.23
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and along with this, the emergency service squads are continuously clearing the debris here"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2246.63
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2244.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "squads are continuously clearing the debris here and that debris is being continuously"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2249.27
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2246.63
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "and that debris is being continuously removed through vehicles and along with this, the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2251.19
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2249.27
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "removed through vehicles and along with this, the pit at the place where the missile had fallen is also being"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2254.47
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2251.19
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "pit at the place where the missile had fallen is also being filled there. This is an impact site."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2257.27
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2254.47
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "filled there. This is an impact site. The place where you are seeing these Bakhos"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2260.39
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2257.27
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "The place where you are seeing these Bakhos or these bulldozers and these Canes"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2262.39
        ],

      },
      {

          2298.87
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2297.109
        ]
      },
      {

        ],

        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Upadhyay, Tel Aviv till date. Some Indian workers are working inside a building being constructed right next to the area in Israel's capital Tel Aviv where the"

      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2307.349
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "try to know from them what they saw? What were the circumstances? What a scene it was when"
        ],

          2312.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],

        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ]
      },
      {

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2321.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2325.27
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2322.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "We are from Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh. So you are a resident of Unnao. Prakash,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2327.67
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2325.27
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2330.31
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2327.67
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2334.069
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2330.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "incident happen? Sir, this incident happened at 7:30 in the morning. We have been working in this building for 2 years. This has never happened before. This has happened for the"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2337.109
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2334.069
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

          2338.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2337.109
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "first time. So whenever we get a message, we follow safety. This is the"
        ],

          2344.23
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "whenever we get a message, we follow safety. This is the"

        ],

          2346.63
        ]
      },
      {

        ]
      },

      },

        ]
      },
      {

        ],

        ]
      },
      {

      },
      {

        ],

          2363.109
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

      },

      },

        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],

        ]
      },
      {

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2415.51
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2422.47
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2418.95
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Iran's leader is finished. Iran is completely devastated. Iran is completely on its knees. Iran is pleading. He is"
        ],
        "end_sec": [

        ],

        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        "end_sec": [
          2430.55
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2428.31
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Because he has no other way left."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2435.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2430.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Everything we are doing we are making great the border is great the military is great we are having"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2440.79
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2438.069
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "the border is great the military is great we are having by the way a tremendous"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2444.15
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2440.79
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "by the way a tremendous success you know we had one in"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2446.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2444.15
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "success you know we had one in well and now we are having one"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2449.75
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2446.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "well and now we are having one in"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2451.91
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2449.75
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "in Trump is used to making such sky-high claims. It has been"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2454.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2451.91
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Trump is used to making such sky-high claims. It has been his nature to speak excessively."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2457.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2454.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "his nature to speak excessively. But today he has made a big claim"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2459.829
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2457.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "But today he has made a big claim which, if true, can prove to be a milestone towards peace in this war."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2462.71
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2459.829
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "which, if true, can prove to be a milestone towards peace in this war."
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2465.43
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2462.71
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "yesterday was actually a present and the present today was a very big present, a tremendous"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2481.27
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2476.55
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "present and the present today was a very big present, a tremendous amount of money and I'm not going to"
        ],

        ],

        ]
      },
      {

        ],

          2485.349
        ]
      },

        "text": [

        ]
      },
      {

      },

        ],

        "start_sec": [
          2498.55
        ]
      },
      {

        ],

          2502.47
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2499.91
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "So Iran, for whom Trump is a thorn in the eye at this time. If Trump is to be believed,"
        ],
        "end_sec": [
          2504.95
        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2502.47
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2504.95
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [

        ],

          2507.75
        ]
      },
      {

        ],

      },
      {

      },
      {

          2533.349

      },
      {

          2542.79
        ]
      },
      {

        ],
        "start_sec": [
          2545.99
        ]
      },
      {
        "text": [
          "Everyone knows that Horboz is the trump card for Iran which can force even a powerful leader like Trump to"

      },
      {

        ]
      },

        ],

        ]
      },

      },

        ],

          2561.109
        ]
      },

there is something we are doing wrong the entities field on the ui still returns empty also thsi is an issue: 
description vs. text: The description field contains the raw YouTube video description. The text field contains that exact same description, but with the entire transcript_full string pasted immediately after it.

Transcript Repetition: The transcript itself exists in three different places:

Inside the transcript_full string.

Broken down into timestamped chunks in the transcript_segments array.

Appended to the very end of the text field.

also i do not need thsi in the elastic search document: transcript_segments and fields , it has embeddings and others repeated for no reason 
can you make all these fixes i will delete index and recollect data and test also the entities issue started happening after we added transcripts so its broken somewhere

context: 
Yes, for the NLP-based entity generation path we do pass transcript content indirectly.

post-preprocessor merges transcript_full into the canonical text field via buildTranscriptSearchText(...), so a YouTube post’s text becomes description + transcript when a transcript exists: post-preprocessor/index.ts (line 134) and transcript.ts (line 39).

Then the entity-generation prompt uses buildPrimaryText(post), which includes title, description, and text, and sends that as the text field to OpenAI: nlp/index.ts (line 255) and nlp/index.ts (line 301) and nlp/index.ts (line 433).

So the practical answer is: transcript text is included in entity generation, but not as a separate transcript_full field in the prompt. It gets folded into the post text first.

do not pass transcripts for entity generation please its too big and not needed only have title and description in case of youtube other platforms are untouched anyways but please recheck for the same 
<image></image>

@arbiter/workflows:test:unit: ✓ case-study workflows > marks canceled creation runs as failed [0.15ms]
